actions.expression:
SELECT cangkuzl.sid,cangkuzl.lxr,cangkuzl.dq 
FROM cangkuzl 
WHERE (cangkuzl.ckmc=[出库单.仓库名称]) 
ORDER BY cangkuzl.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT storage.sid,
       storage.wyzd,
       storage.Exporter,
       storage.SalesOrderNo,
       storage.Salesman,
       storage.WarehouseName,
       storage.PurchasingAgent,
       storage.gdry,
       storage.yzrq,
       storage.rkdd,
       storage.StorageDate,
       storage.jcrq,
       storage.PurchaseOrderNo,
       storage.SupplierShortName,
       storage.Collator
FROM   storage ,storageline 
WHERE (storage.rid=storageline.pid) 
  AND (storage.SNID=[出库单.进仓单号]) 
  AND permission('入库单') 
ORDER BY storageline.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT cght.sid,cght.wxbm 
FROM cght 
WHERE (cght.hthm=[出库单.采购合同]) 
ORDER BY cght.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT inventorydetail.sid,
       inventorydetail.ItemNo,
       inventorydetail.zwmc,
       inventorydetail.Exporter,
       inventorydetail.gdry,
       inventorydetail.Salesman,
       inventorydetail.PurchasingAgent,
       inventorydetail.PurchaseOrderNo,
       inventorydetail.SupplierShortName,
       inventorydetail.PalletQty,
       inventorydetail.CartonQty,
       inventorydetail.InCartonQty,
       inventorydetail.OutCartonQty,
       inventorydetail.OuterLength,
       inventorydetail.OuterWidth,
       inventorydetail.OuterHeight,
       inventorydetail.OuterVolume,
       inventorydetail.OuterGrossWeight,
       inventorydetail.OuterNetWeight,
       inventorydetail.WarehousePosition,
       inventorydetail.Collator,
       inventorydetail.StorageDate,
       inventorydetail.StorageTime,
       inventorydetail.Memo,
       inventorydetail.SalesOrderNo,
       inventorydetail.WarehouseName,
       inventorydetail.Operator,
       inventorydetail.rkdd,
       inventorydetail.jcf,
       inventorydetail.rid,
       inventorydetail.wxwyzd,
       inventorydetail.cgwyzd,
       inventorydetail.OuterLength1,
       inventorydetail.ReturnCartonQty,
       inventorydetail.OuterWidth1,
       inventorydetail.OuterHeight1,
       inventorydetail.OuterGrossWeight1,
       inventorydetail.OuterNetWeight1,
       inventorydetail.OuterVolume1,
       inventorydetail.Volume1,
       inventorydetail.GrossWeight1,
       inventorydetail.ywpath,
       inventorydetail.thyy,
       inventorydetail.cgpath,
       inventorydetail.UserID,
       inventorydetail.ReturnCartonQty2,
       inventorydetail.SNID,
       inventorydetail.wyzd
FROM inventorydetail 
WHERE (inventorydetail.SNID=[出库单.进仓单号]) 
  AND (inventorydetail.ReturnCartonQty>0) 
  AND permission('库存明细') 
ORDER BY inventorydetail.sid ASC

SELECT inventorydetail.sid,
       inventorydetail.ItemNo,
       inventorydetail.zwmc,
       inventorydetail.Exporter,

       inventorydetail.Salesman,
       inventorydetail.PurchasingAgent,

       inventorydetail.OuterHeight,

       inventorydetail.ReturnCartonQty,
       inventorydetail.SalesOrderNo,

       inventorydetail.jcf,

       inventorydetail.wxwyzd,
       inventorydetail.cgwyzd,

actions.expression:
SELECT thtzsheet.sid,
       thtzsheet.OuterLength,
       thtzsheet.OuterWidth,
       thtzsheet.OuterHeight,
       thtzsheet.PurchaseOrderNo,
       thtzsheet.ItemNo,
       thtzsheet.OuterGrossWeight,
       thtzsheet.OuterNetWeight,
       thtzsheet.CartonQty,
       thtzsheet.PalletQty,
       thtzsheet.syts,
       thtzsheet.OutCartonQty,
       thtzsheet.Memo,
       thtzsheet.OuterVolume,
       thtzsheet.Collator,
       thtzsheet.WarehousePosition,
       thtzsheet.WarehousePosition1,
       thtzsheet.StorageDate,
       thtzsheet.ckrq,
       thtzsheet.StorageTime,
       thtzsheet.SNID,
       thtzsheet.SupplierShortName,
       thtzsheet.PurchasingAgent,
       thtzsheet.gdry,
       thtzsheet.Salesman,
       thtzsheet.ywbm,
       thtzsheet.zwmc,
       thtzsheet.Exporter,
       thtzsheet.InCartonQty,
       thtzsheet.thxs,
       thtzsheet.SalesOrderNo,
       thtzsheet.WarehouseName,
       thtzsheet.Operator,
       thtzsheet.rkdd,
       thtzsheet.jcf,
       thtzsheet.rid,
       thtzsheet.wyzd,
       thtzsheet.wxwyzd,
       thtzsheet.cgwyzd,
       thtzsheet.OuterLength1,
       thtzsheet.OuterWidth1,
       thtzsheet.OuterHeight1,
       thtzsheet.OuterGrossWeight1,
       thtzsheet.OuterNetWeight1,
       thtzsheet.OuterVolume1,
       thtzsheet.Volume1,
       thtzsheet.GrossWeight1,
       thtzsheet.ywpath,
       thtzsheet.cgpath,
       thtzsheet.thyy,
       thtzsheet.khmc,
       thtzsheet.inStorageDetailId,
       thtzsheet.StorageDays,
       thtz.thyy,
       thtz.bzxx
FROM thtz,thtzsheet 
WHERE (thtz.rid=thtzsheet.pid) 
  AND (thtz.zyh=[出库单.退货作业号]) 
ORDER BY thtzsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-基数合计
actions.caption: 计算-基数合计
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.基数]

actions.name: 计算-周期
actions.caption: 计算-周期
actions.expression: [出库单.基数合计]/[出库单.体积合计]

actions.name: 计算-费用合计
actions.caption: 计算-费用合计
actions.expression: [出库单.装柜费用]+[出库单.进仓费用]+[出库单.过 磅 费]+[出库单.运   费]+[出库单.其它费用]

actions.name: 计算-基数
actions.caption: 计算-基数
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.在仓天数]*[出库单.产品资料.出库总体积]

actions.name: 计算-在仓总体积
actions.caption: 计算-在仓总体积
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.在仓箱数]*[出库单.产品资料.仓库体积]
actions.output: 出库单.产品资料.在仓总体积

actions.name: 计算-在仓总毛重
actions.caption: 计算-在仓总毛重
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.仓库毛重]*[出库单.产品资料.在仓箱数]
actions.output: 出库单.产品资料.在仓总毛重

actions.name: 计算-出库总体积
actions.caption: 计算-出库总体积
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.出库箱数]*[出库单.产品资料.仓库体积]
actions.output: 出库单.产品资料.出库总体积

actions.name: 计算-退库总体积
actions.caption: 计算-退库总体积
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.退货箱数]*[出库单.产品资料.仓库体积]
actions.output: 出库单.产品资料.退库总体积

actions.name: 计算-出库总毛重
actions.caption: 计算-出库总毛重
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.出库箱数]*[出库单.产品资料.仓库毛重]
actions.output: 出库单.产品资料.出库总毛重

actions.name: 计算-退库总毛重
actions.caption: 计算-退库总毛重
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.退货箱数]*[出库单.产品资料.仓库毛重]
actions.output: 出库单.产品资料.退库总毛重

actions.name: 计算-库存箱数
actions.caption: 计算-库存箱数
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.在仓箱数1]-[出库单.产品资料.出库箱数]
actions.output: 出库单.产品资料.库存箱数

actions.name: 计算-箱数合计
actions.caption: 计算-箱数合计
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.出库箱数]

actions.name: 计算-毛重合计
actions.caption: 计算-毛重合计
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.出库总毛重]

actions.name: 计算-体积合计
actions.caption: 计算-体积合计
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.出库总体积]

actions.name: 计算-总在仓天数
actions.caption: 计算-总在仓天数
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.在仓天数]

actions.name: 计算-总仓储费
actions.caption: 计算-总仓储费
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.仓储费]

actions.name: 计算-退货毛重合计
actions.caption: 计算-退货毛重合计
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.退库总毛重]

actions.name: 计算-退货体积合计
actions.caption: 计算-退货体积合计
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.退库总体积]

actions.name: 计算-综合仓库费用
actions.caption: 计算-综合仓库费用
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.综合仓库费用]

actions.name: 进仓单号

fields.output: 出库单.进仓单号
fields.caption: 进仓单号

actions.expression:
SELECT DISTINCT storage.SNID SNID
FROM `storage`
ORDER BY storage.SNID ASC
actions.caption: 进仓单号

actions.name: 出库单.产品资料.仓库体积
actions.output: 出库单.产品资料.仓库体积
actions.caption: 出库单.产品资料.仓库体积
actions.expression: ([出库单.产品资料.仓库长度]*[出库单.产品资料.仓库宽度]*[出库单.产品资料.仓库高度])/1000000

actions.name: 出库单.产品资料.外箱体积
actions.output: 出库单.产品资料.外箱体积
actions.caption: 出库单.产品资料.外箱体积
actions.expression: [出库单.产品资料.外箱长度]*[出库单.产品资料.外箱宽度]*[出库单.产品资料.外箱高度]/1000000

view.params:
SELECT wfgs.wfgs,wfgs.SID
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT cangkuzl.ckmc,cangkuzl.SID
FROM cangkuzl
ORDER BY cangkuzl.SID ASC

SELECT cangkuzl.ckmc,cangkuzl.SID
FROM cangkuzl
ORDER BY cangkuzl.SID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(storage.SNID)
FROM storage
ORDER BY storage.SNID ASC

宁波
义乌
汕头

FROM cdzl
ORDER BY cdzl.SID ASC,cdzl.cdmc ASC

仓库费用
散货运费

FROM thtz
WHERE   (thtz.WarehouseName=[出库单.仓库名称]) and (thtz.sfcz="否")
ORDER BY thtz.SID ASC
